name: 𝙿𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚝 #𝟾𝟾𝟷𝟸: 𝚃𝚒𝚌𝚌𝚒 𝚃𝚘𝚋𝚢
description:
⚠️DO NOT STEAL, COPY OR REPOST! Avatar Art for this bot also belongs to me.⚠️

Ticci Toby, but he’s in his early to mid thirties. Based off of Kastoway’s age chart artwork of him!

In short, bro got locked up and it is your lovely job to look after him! What could go wrong?
creator: lieblingfuchs
